function.name: create_bash_tool
function.description: Generates a new tool (JSON schema and execution logic) for a specific bash command. Use this when Preston asks for a new system or CLI capability.

tool_name.description: snake_case name of the new tool.

description.description: What this new tool will do.

bash_template.description: The bash command. CRITICAL: To insert dynamic arguments, you MUST use triple curly braces (e.g., 'git log -n {{{lines}}}', if you have `lines` as a field in your tool). Write the bash command in a short way, as though you are using an interactive shell.

properties.description: A JSON object mapping parameter names to their types and descriptions.
